case_title: JIMMY MCCOY VS. DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS et al

docket_entries.description: CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCOY, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS MUSSELMANN, KENNETH G AN INDIVIDUAL CARROLL, PATRICK J AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-28-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-26-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-31-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-28-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JIMMY MCCOY FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-28-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-13-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY JUDY THOMPSON. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-12-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-28-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-12-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST JIMMY MCCOY, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-12-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-27-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: BELDON YEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-12-2002 CONTINUED TO OCT-07-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-07-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-07-2002 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LISA SARTO, CSR # 8994. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Lisa Sarto, CSR # 8994. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2002 Continued To Oct-07-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 10/7/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-12-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-29-2002 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. $200.00 sanctions imposed against pltf in pro per. Osc is off calendar. Proceedings reported by Judy Thompson. (212)
